title: Windows Service Creation via SC
description: Detects creation of new Windows services using sc.exe, which may indicate persistence or privilege escalation.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*sc.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*create*'))
